features: EXCEPTIONAL ABSORBENCY & DURABILITY The mop's cotton fibers ensure fast absorbency and large capacity, allowing you to effectively clean with fewer wipes. The durability of the straps ensures that the mop retains its cleaning properties over time, making it a reliable investment for daily cleaning.

IDEAL FOR RUGH AND SENSITIVE FLOORS The Eco Mopy is perfect for rough floors that require more water, such as terracotta as well as delicate floors like marble. This versatility makes it an essential tool for any home and provides excellent performance on all surfaces.

DURABLE & CERTIFIED SLEEVE The mop bushing is made of 100% materials for post-industrial and after consumption, certified as "recycled plastic secondary raw material". Compact, wear-resistant and weatherproof, this component guarantees a long service life and optimal performance even in difficult conditions.

100% RECYCLED COTTON RIBBONS - The mop bands are made from 100% recycled and virgin cotton fibres. These bands are soft and highly absorbent and offer high cleaning ability and wear resistance. Ideal for washing all types of floors, from rough surfaces such as terracotta to delicate floors such as marble.

100% RECYCLED AND RECYCLABLE MATERIALS The Eco Mopy Floor Mop is made exclusively from 100% recycled and recyclable materials, ensuring a sustainable product without the addition of dyes. This material selection ensures effective and environmentally friendly cleaning.
description: Product Description TONKITA Eco Friendly Cotton Mop Household Cleaning and Cleaning Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep away from direct bare flame or heat.
